title: serapias × pulae
intro: Serapias × pulae is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Serapias neglecta and Serapias lingua. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Serapias × pulae include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical creams and ointments for various health applications.
